gauge.name: Silver River near L`Anse

impacts.statement: Water begins to flow over the bridge on Skanee Road
Water levels approach Skanee Road on the west side of the river
Water reaches the bottom of the bridge on Skanee Road and backwater effects begin
Flood waters may impact homes and low lying areas along the river near Skanee Road...Townline Road...and Collins Road
The river begins to overflow its natural banks and flooding of low lying wooded areas occurs

properties.caption: Skanee Road Bridge at the Silver River

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage and computed discharge may be affected by ice.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
